reason:
Set 050 S2 close-out attestation.

Verification method: manual (self-verified; no router invoked per the
end-of-session-only cost restriction). S2 is a Python implementation
session off the S1-locked verdict: docs/schema-current.json (declarative
advisory manifest) + ai_router/check_migrations.py (detect-only scanner).

Evidence: full ai_router suite green (988 passed, 1 skipped, 0
regressions) including 21 new check_migrations tests; the
manifest==SESSION_STATE_SCHEMA_VERSION CI guard; and the carried-risk-#2
v2-needs-chain end-to-end test. Real-CLI harvester-mirror fixture (2 v2
among 3 v4) reports exit 1 with both v2 sets flagged and the corrected
three-migrator bulk chain recommended.

Cross-provider verification deferred to S5 (the set's verification
session), per the established per-set pattern. Flagged for that verifier:
the S2 deviation from the verdict's two-migrator bulk sequence
(corrected to three migrators; migrate_session_state added because a
genuine v2 file is skipped by both lightweight-to-v4 and v3-to-v4).

reason:
Set 050 S3 close-out attestation.

Verification method: manual (self-verified; no router invoked, per the
end-of-session-only cost restriction and the per-set pattern that defers
cross-provider verification to S5).

Context: takeover/continuation. The S3 deliverable was committed at
b8b2066 by a prior claude-sonnet-4-6 chat that registered the session
start (3859066) but stopped without writing the S3 activity-log entry,
the S3 disposition, or running close-out. This claude-opus-4-8 chat
critically reviewed the committed diff, confirmed it satisfies all four
S1-locked S3 steps, and is closing out.

Evidence: Python suite green for the S3 surface — test_invoker_schema_constant.py
(the CI guard pinning the JS CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION == ai_router
SCHEMA_VERSION) + test_check_migrations.py = 22 passed. TS Layer-2
(npm run test:unit) = 561 passing / 2 failing, where BOTH failures
(configEditor-foundation panel-lifecycle vscode.ViewColumn.One stub gap;
notificationsSection stale "Set 026" assertion) live in files last
touched in commit c2a336f (Set 026) and are pre-existing stub-harness
failures unrelated to S3; the invoker's own scanSchemaDrift +
CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION suite passes within the run.

Flagged for the S5 verifier:
- The unassigned end-of-set "Explorer UX revision" deliverable
  (asterisk + "Ran under schema v<N>" tooltip replacing the
  (needs migration) row description; single title-bar "Upgrade older
  session sets" icon running the corrected three-migrator bulk chain)
  appears in End-of-set deliverables but is NOT in any session's Steps.
  It was NOT done in S3. It needs a home in S4 or S5 — carried forward
  in the next_orchestrator reason.
- The S2 deviation (corrected three-migrator bulk chain vs. the
  verdict's two) remains flagged for S5.
